claude_desktop_note: Requires Claude Desktop v0.10 or later (supports remote HTTP MCP). Older versions only support stdio servers.
config_hint: Add this to your Cursor or Claude Desktop settings:
copy_config: Copy config for Cursor / Claude Desktop
info_hint: Clients identify themselves by name (Cursor → "cursor", Claude Desktop → "claude-ai"). Tool calls from external clients appear in Dome logs.
server_stopped_hint: Start the server to allow connections.
subtitle: Expose all Dome tools to external clients (Cursor, Claude Desktop, etc.) via an HTTP MCP server.
title: Dome as MCP Server
